'''âk-ng-v-dh''' ('''kakangvedhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:webstream|webstream]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-ng-v-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:webstream|webstream]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âk-ng-v-dh
|-
! Lemma
| kakangvedhoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikangvedhoko|thikangvedhoko]] || [[word:jikangvedhoko|jikangvedhoko]] || [[word:shikangvedhoko|shikangvedhoko]] || [[word:kikangvedhoko|kikangvedhoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthukangvedhoko|thuthukangvedhoko]] || [[word:jujukangvedhoko|jujukangvedhoko]] || [[word:shushukangvedhoko|shushukangvedhoko]] || [[word:kukukangvedhoko|kukukangvedhoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokangvedhoko|thokangvedhoko]] || [[word:jokangvedhoko|jokangvedhoko]] || [[word:shokangvedhoko|shokangvedhoko]] || [[word:kokangvedhoko|kokangvedhoko]]
|-

|-

|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shakangvedhithi|shakangvedhithi]] || [[word:shakangvedhiji|shakangvedhiji]] || [[word:shakangvedhishi|shakangvedhishi]] || [[word:shakangvedhiki|shakangvedhiki]]
